ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie as originally released */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Comma-separated genres associated with the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "production_budget" REAL /* Production budget of the movie */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic gross revenue from the movie */,
  "worldwide_gross" REAL /* Worldwide gross revenue from the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Writer of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "plot_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie plot */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_companies" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the production company */,
  "production_role" TEXT /* Role of the production company (e.g., producer, distributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_performance" (
  "movie_id" TEXT /* Reference to the movie */,
  "opening_weekend" REAL /* Opening weekend box office revenue */,
  "domestic_gross" REAL /* Domestic gross revenue */,
  "worldwide_gross" REAL /* Worldwide gross revenue */,
  "grossing_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the movie by grossing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., production, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" TEXT /* ID of the movie accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import event */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the import was performed */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the imported data (e.g., IMDb, Box Office Mojo) */,
  "import_file" TEXT /* File name of the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export event */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the export was performed */,
  "export_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the exported data (e.g., email, FTP server) */,
  "export_file" TEXT /* File name of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., box office performance, user engagement) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File name of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
